behaviors.description: The review input is scoped to the lines that changed, not the full content of each modified file.
behaviors.justification: Seam-map: module/interface seam between diff extraction and review-input builder. Real failure is incorrect handoff (full file leaked instead of changed hunks). Integration-brake: no required real OS/network/subprocess, no model-judgment dependency, no multi-step agentic chain. Rejection-gate: System is disqualified by behavior text focusing on input scoping logic, not real HTTP/PR rendering; Agentic/Workflow are disqualified because correctness does not depend on LLM output.
behaviors.test_description: Run the diff-reader + input-construction modules together on fixture PR diffs with unchanged and changed regions; assert the produced review payload includes only changed hunks/lines and excludes untouched file content.

behaviors.description: Inline comments are attached to the correct positions in the diff view on the pull request.
behaviors.justification: Seam-map: environment seam at GitHub PR comment API + diff-position semantics. Real failures often come from true API coordinate rules (commit SHA/path/line/side) and rendering behavior that mocks hide. Rejection-gate: Integration is disqualified because behavior text explicitly requires correctness in the PR diff view, which is an external-system outcome.
behaviors.test_description: Against a real test PR, post inline comments using computed positions, then fetch PR review comments and verify each appears on the intended file/line in diff coordinates.

behaviors.description: The agent identifies at least one real defect in a pull request that contains a known introduced bug.
behaviors.justification: Seam-map: model-judgment seam. Correctness depends on real LLM defect-detection quality; deterministic stubs would always pass and hide true miss-detection failures. Rejection-gate: Workflow is disqualified because this behavior checks one judgment outcome (detecting at least one real bug), not full multi-step pipeline completion.
behaviors.test_description: Use a curated PR with a known seeded bug; run the real model-based review and assert at least one returned finding correctly targets the seeded defect.

behaviors.description: Every finding listed in the top-level summary corresponds to an inline comment that was also posted — no findings appear in the summary without a matching inline comment.
behaviors.justification: Seam-map: module/interface seam between finding collection, inline-post result tracking, and summary generation. Real failure is cross-module state mismatch (summary includes unposted item). Integration-brake: no mandatory real OS/network behavior if posting outcomes are simulated in-process; no LLM-quality dependency; no multi-step agentic chain required for this invariant. Rejection-gate: System is disqualified because behavior text is about correspondence invariant, not external rendering/network behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Wire summary builder with inline-comment posting/result tracker using in-process fakes that simulate successes/failures; assert summary includes only findings with successful inline post IDs.

behaviors.description: The full sequence — reading the diff, posting inline comments, posting the summary comment — completes correctly for a real pull request without manual intervention.
behaviors.justification: Seam-map: multi-step orchestration seam across end-to-end agent pipeline on real PR infrastructure, including agentic analysis plus external API actions. This behavior explicitly requires the complete autonomous sequence on a real PR, which exceeds single-step Agentic or isolated System checks.
behaviors.test_description: Execute the automation end-to-end on a real sandbox PR: fetch diff, run real review generation, post inline comments, post summary, and verify terminal success plus expected artifacts without human fixes between steps.
